transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you for calling Willowbrook Health Navigation. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Hi, I need to reschedule my appointment with Dr. Kessler next week.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure, I can help with that. Can I get your member ID, please?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, I have your file pulled up under member ID A-B-4-4-7-9. What day works better for you?

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Um, okay. Maybe Thursday afternoon instead of Tuesday morning?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I see an opening this Thursday at 2:15 PM with Dr. Kessler. Would that work?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, I've moved your appointment to Thursday at 2:15 PM. You'll get a confirmation text shortly.

transcript.speaker: patient
transcript.text: Sounds good, thanks for your help.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: You're welcome. Have a great day, and we'll see you Thursday.
